requirement.title: Add dark/light mode toggle to the dashboard
requirement.description: Add a theme toggle button to the Header that switches between dark and light CSS variable themes. State persists in localStorage. No new dependencies.

architect.summary: data-theme attribute on html element + useTheme hook in Header; [data-theme=light] CSS block; no prop drilling; no new packages. WCAG AA token table provided.

security.summary: STRIDE completed. No PII, no XSS vector, no CSP regression, no compliance violation. APPROVED unconditionally.

developer.summary: useTheme hook + sun/moon icons added to shared.jsx; [data-theme=light] token block + .hdr-theme-btn CSS added to styles.css. localStorage wrapped in try/catch.

qa.summary: All 6 criteria pass after SC4 contrast fix. --fg-faint raised from oklch(0.58) to oklch(0.46) to achieve WCAG AA. SC6 pre-existing dashboard.jsx and settings.json changes confirmed out-of-scope.
